questionHtml:
Which of the following can be both formed from bromoethane and converted directly into ethanal?

CH3CH2Br → X
X → CH3CHO

A. CH3CH2OH

B. CH3OCH3

C. CH3COOH

D. H2C=CHBr

meta.title: Which of the following can be both formed from bromoethane and converted directly into ethanal? CH3CH2Br → XX → CH3CHO A. CH3CH2OH B. CH3OCH3 C. CH3COOH D. H2C=CHBr
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.4.2—In a nucleophilic substitution reaction, a nucleophile donates an electron pair to form a new bond, as another bond breaks producing a leaving group. Deduce equations with descriptions and explanations of the movement of electron pairs in nucleophilic substitution reactions.
